jobs.name: Gossip Idle Check
jobs.prompt: Run the gossip idle check flow. Call gossip_check_idle first. If should_fire is true, call gossip_build_context, then generate a gossip message based on the context and call gossip_generate to log it. If should_fire is false, do nothing.

jobs.name: Calendar + Email Sync
jobs.prompt: Call gossip_sync_sources to sync calendar events and emails for all members who have connected their Google accounts.

jobs.name: Location Check
jobs.prompt: Check where group members are by opening Google Maps location sharing in the browser. Use browser_navigate to go to https://www.google.com/maps. If you see a login prompt, sign in with the Google Maps credentials (email from GOOGLE_MAPS_EMAIL env). Then navigate to the location sharing view. Use browser_vision to see all shared locations - ask it to list each person's name, their current location/place name, and last update time. Then call gossip_update_locations with the extracted data. Finally, close the browser with browser_close.
